hero.question: LoL: G2 Esports vs Team Heretics - Game 1 Winner
hero.prob_take: G2 at 94% is the market saying this is a coronation, not a competition, Heretics would need a perfect storm to steal Game 1. The real tell is whether this confidence holds through draft phase, because G2's tendency to draft themselves into awkward matchups late in series could crack this certainty if it shows up in Game 1.

daily_take.headline: G2's Odds Just Hit 94%. Smart Money Disagrees.
daily_take.deck: G2 Esports jumped 12 points overnight to 94% against Heretics, driven by casual volume and narrative creep. But 94% for a best-of-one LEC matchup is a sucker price. G2 is the better org, sure, but Heretics have real firepower and one game erases form. Fade the crowd here, or at minimum wait for 96%+ before selling.

sidebar.headline: Iran uranium deal is pricing in a diplomatic moonshot that doesn't exist yet. This 10.5% drop smells like political reality, but watch State Department chatter.
sidebar.label: Iran Uranium by May 31: 10.5%

sidebar.headline: Real Salt Lake -1.5 just jumped 12 points in 24 hours. Movement this sharp usually means sharps just loaded the boat. Size matters more than direction here.
sidebar.label: Real Salt Lake Spread: 56.5%

sidebar.headline: Bondi's 69% survival odds are stable but illiquid with only $3K volume. Any political shock sends this flying. Not enough liquidity to trust yet.
